controls.hintEnabled: Click to toggle. Shift-click selects a range of deletable messages.
controls.hintDisabled: Enable bulk mode to select multiple chat messages.

messages.checkbox: Select chat message for bulk deletion

confirm.title: Delete selected chat messages
confirm.body: Delete {count} selected chat messages? Only messages you are allowed to remove will be deleted.
